sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ الطِّفْلُ الْأَذَانَ وَقَالَ: وَقْتُ الصَّلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je čulo ezan i reklo: Vrijeme namaza.
sentences.translationEn: The child heard the adhan and said: It is prayer time.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَ لُعَبَهُ جَانِبًا وَذَهَبَ مَعَ أَبِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Ostavio je igračke sa strane i otišao sa ocem.
sentences.translationEn: He put his toys aside and went with his father.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفَا جَنْبًا إِلَى جَنْبٍ وَصَلَّيَا مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Stali su jedan do drugog i klanjali zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: They stood side by side and prayed together.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطِّفْلُ: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُصَلِّيَ مَعَ أَبِي.
sentences.translation: Dijete je reklo: Volim klanjati sa tatom.
sentences.translationEn: The child said: I love to pray with my father.
